Labels: deploy


  ## ✨ Description

  Please provide a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them, including detailing any technical or
  architectural decisions you have made. If you gave a branch name using Linear's
  branch naming conventions https://linear.app/docs/github, it will be automatically linked to the corresponding
  ticket.

  This PR updates the Handset service API surface to match an updated spec
  https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YgigjG4sW2AVgeW2LcRy1A4Ee0ZybaCJ/edit (new/renamed endpoints and
  request/response shapes) and introduces a new ingestion path to source handset catalogue metadata from a Google
  Sheet, persisting it with versioning support in MongoDB.

  ## 🔍 Changes Made

  Outline the major changes in this PR or signpost reviewers to a particular change:

  • Updated HandsetAPI proto/API: renamed routes under /v1/handsets/*, split eligibility callbacks into
  success/failure/status update endpoints, and replaced GetContractByRequestID with GetRequest.
  • Introduced a Sheets-backed updater (internal/sheet) and wired it into consumer mode to periodically upsert handset
  metadata.
  • Migrated handset/contract identifiers and storage APIs toward UUIDs and added handset “properties versioning”
  support.

  ## 🧪 How to Test

  If there are additional test or review steps required to better understand this change, please include them here:

  •

  ## 📚 Additional Notes

  Add any extra information, context, or points of discussion here:

  •

  ## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

  If this PR includes visual changes, please provide screenshots:

  •
